title: Yellow Enchants
body:
![Yellow Enchants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/784bf4ba4ce96714ca27235b646ef098315a3140_0.webp)

**✨ Important**
This resource pack changes the enchantment glint on items and armor to a **golden hue**, giving your enchanted gear a distinct and magical look.

---

**📜 About the Pack**
Created by **dRakeeq**, this pack works seamlessly with **3D item models** while maintaining a **vanilla-friendly** atmosphere.
It enhances most in-game items without breaking the original Minecraft feel, offering a subtle yet refreshing upgrade.
